title.zh: 带注意力机制的神经机器翻译

description.en: Dzmitry Bahdanau, Kyunghyun Cho, and Yoshua Bengio introduced an attention mechanism that let a neural translation decoder look back at different source positions. This made alignment a learned, differentiable part of sequence-to-sequence modeling.
description.zh: 兹米特里·巴赫达瑙、赵京贤和约书亚·本吉奥提出注意力机制，让神经翻译解码器能回看源句中的不同位置。这使对齐成为序列到序列建模中可学习、可微分的一部分。

caption.zh: 蒙特利尔深度学习研究背景图

subcaption.en: Institutional context for neural attention research
subcaption.zh: 神经注意力研究的机构背景

subcaption.en: Original local explainer of source-token attention.
subcaption.zh: 关于源令牌注意力的本地原创解释图。

license.en: Original local SVG redraw; source figures are not copied.
